name: coinor-libclp1
title: coinor-libclp1
description:
Coin-or linear programming solver (shared libraries)
Clp (Coin-or linear programming) is an open-source linear programming solver
written in C++. It is primarily meant to be used as a callable library, but a
basic, stand-alone executable version is also available. It is designed to
find solutions of constrained linear mathematical optimization problems.
.
This package contains the Clp callable libraries, including the
OSI Clp interface.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use coinor-libclp1 because Coin-or linear programming solver (shared libraries).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use coinor-libclp1 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair coinor-libclp1 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `coinor-libclp1 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
